key.name: instance-id
key.description: UUID v4 generated on first enable and persisted forever. Used as the per-display settings key on the daemon side; survives renames, GPU swaps, and DE restarts.

key.name: display-name
key.summary: Human-readable display name reported to the daemon

key.name: show-diagnostics
key.summary: Overlay connection / resolution / window-state on the wallpaper

key.name: overview-blur
key.description: Apply a gaussian blur to the overview background wallpaper, like Blur my Shell does for the static wallpaper. Pairs well with Blur my Shell (the two are z-ordered to coexist), but does not require it.

key.name: overview-blur-strength
key.description: Gaussian blur radius (in pixels) for the overview background. Higher is blurrier. 0 effectively disables the blur even when it is on.
